title: Hershey (HSY) Looks Promising on Pricing & Prudent Buyouts
text: Hershey's (HSY) solid pricing initiatives have been yielding results for a while. The company has strategically increased its presence and expanded its portfolio through acquisitions.

title: Hershey workers at Virginia plant vote against unionizing
text: Workers at Hershey Co's second largest U.S. manufacturing plant voted against unionizing, even as unionization efforts have gained momentum among low-paid workers at large U.S. corporations.

title: 10 S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Trading Within 5% of 52-Week Highs
text: The S&P 500 is down 8.94% year-to-date. Despite the slow start, there are still S&P 500 stocks to buy trading within 5% of 52-week highs.

title: Is This Dividend Growth Stock a Buy?
text: The confectioner Hershey has a track record of high dividend growth.

title: Hershey Stock: Too Far, Too Fast
text: Assuming a 10% raise in Hershey's quarterly dividend this July, the stock's adjusted diluted EPS payout ratio will remain in the high-40% range from 2021 to 2022.

title: Hershey (HSY) Soars to 52-Week High, Time to Cash Out?
text: Hershey (HSY) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.
